title: Ophiuros perforatus
taxonomy: Ophiuros perforatus is classified as a species of brittle star in the class Ophiuroidea, within the phylum Echinodermata, and kingdom Animalia. It belongs to the family Ophiuridae and the order Ophiurida. The genus Ophiuros is part of the class Ophiuroidea and is known for its distinctive star-shaped body. The classification of Ophiuros perforatus provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other marine animals. By understanding its classification, researchers can better comprehend the biology and behavior of this species.
